candidate.description: Requiring majority of replicas to acknowledge a read or write to tolerate failures while maintaining consistency.

l2s.scope_1line: Simple majority (N/2 + 1) required for read or write operations.
Relaxed quorum that accepts writes on substitute nodes during failures.
Single leader accepts writes, followers replicate asynchronously.

l1s.scope_1line: Voting-based coordination for replicated reads and writes.
Maintaining multiple copies of data across nodes.
